tool: Browser plugin in-app browser for DOM/log/interaction checks, clean tab after restarting dev server
logHandling: Browser dev logs retained one historical hydration error from an earlier hot-update mismatch at 2026-06-11T15:10:04.128Z. Final pass/fail uses relevantLogs with timestamps at or after each navigationStartedAt.
overlayDetection: Real framework error text markers plus visible Next.js dialog/toast nodes only. Empty 0x0 dev-mode nextjs-portal placeholders are recorded but not treated as overlays.
